title: stylidium centrolepoides
intro: Stylidium centrolepoides, also known as the clubbed triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stylidium centrolepoides include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Aboriginal medicine in Australia, where it grows in the wild.
